TestCase z11Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_k = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_k, t1.k, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.k = follow_case_k;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n <= 0
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        // No elements to shift, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: right circular shift (move last element to front)
    double last = follow_case.k[follow_case.n - 1];
    for (int i = follow_case.n - 1; i > 0; --i) {
        follow_case.k[i] = follow_case.k[i - 1];
    }
    follow_case.k[0] = last;
    
    return follow_case;
}
